local_updates: Thunder playoff energy remains active through watch parties and Paycom activity.
Paseo Arts Festival and Memorial Day weekend create downtown movement.
GalaxyCon wraps up May 24 with convention spillover.
The Wiz concludes May 24 at Civic Center.
Women's College World Series begins later in the week and becomes the next major metro anchor.
Route 66 Centennial Celebration creates a large Saturday downtown draw.
With OU summer slowdown beginning, evening movement shifts more toward downtown OKC, casino traffic, concerts, and nightlife venues.
Summer patterns begin favoring Cowboys OKC, Riverwind, Tower Theater, Brickhouse, Libby's, and downtown nightlife clusters.
